title: Lightfall Client
description: Client side only mod that allows users to join Lightfall servers.
body:
Client side only mod that allows users to join Lightfall servers due to them requiring a custom handshake. Also adds a custom handshake screen so you can view the status of the handshake when connecting.
 

This mod adds no extra content, it is purely for adding compatibility with Lightfall.
 

*Lightfall is a fork of Waterfall with modern Forge support. Check it out [here](https://github.com/ArclightPowered/lightfall).*
